title: The Balance object
excerpt: String representing the object’s type. Objects of the same type share the same value. Available funds that you can transfer or pay out automatically by Stripe or explicitly through the [Transfers API](https://docs.stripe.com/api/balance/balance_object.md#transfers) or [Payouts API](https://docs.stripe.com/api/balance/balance_object.md#payouts). You can find the available balance for each currency and payment type in the `source_types` property. Three-letter [ISO currency code](https://www.iso.org/iso-4217-currency-codes.html), in lowercase. Must be a [supported currency](https://stripe.com/docs/currencies). - `available.source_types` (object, nullable) Breakdown of balance by source types. Funds coming from certain source / payment method types must be shown separately.…
